SHAREHOLDERS AGREEMENT

This Shareholders Agreement (the "SHA") is made on the 1st day of November, 2023.

BETWEEN

1. Dr. Alex Tan, NRIC: S2345678B, residing at 123 Fictional Lane, Singapore 678901, contact number: +65 6123 4567, email: alex.tan@example.sg;

2. Ms. Jamie Lim, NRIC: S3456789C, residing at 456 Imaginary Avenue, Singapore 234567, contact number: +65 6234 5678, email: jamie.lim@example.sg;

3. Visionary Ventures Pte Ltd, UEN: 201234567A, having its registered office at 789 Conceptual Road, Singapore 345678, contact number: +65 6345 6789, represented by Mr. John Ng, email: contact@visionary.sg;

WHEREAS the parties have agreed to enter into this SHA to regulate their relationship as shareholders of Innovative Solutions Pte Ltd, UEN: T12LL3456A.

WHEREAS the parties have examined the current project status and agree that it is not aligned with the original project plan.

The parties agree to a financial commitment of SGD 1,500,000 (the "Investment") as stated in the SPA.

For access to shareholder information, visit https://shareholders.example.sg/user/S3456789C.

This SHA is executed in multiple copies, with each party retaining one copy for their records.
